# AI Business Toolkit by Beorns Co — Full Documentation

> Practical AI guides, prompts, and playbooks for small and medium businesses.

AI Business Toolkit helps SME owners (10-200 employees) adopt AI without consultants, jargon, or big budgets. Four core products, industry-specific prompt packs, a free email course, and 19 blog articles.

Website: https://beornsco.github.io
Contact: beornsco@proton.me

---

## Company

Beorns Co creates practical AI adoption resources for small and medium businesses. Every product is designed for non-technical business owners who want results without complexity.

Social profiles:
- X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/beornsco
- Medium: https://medium.com/@beornsco
- Product Hunt: https://www.producthunt.com/products/ai-business-toolkit-2
- Gumroad: https://beornscout.gumroad.com

---

## Products

### AI Adoption Starter Kit (€27)
A 37-page guide to identifying AI opportunities and building your first AI workflow.

What's inside:
- AI opportunity assessment framework (evaluate which tasks are worth automating)
- Step-by-step adoption roadmap (from zero to first AI workflow)
- ROI calculator worksheet (quantify time and cost savings before investing)
- AI policy template (governance framework for responsible AI use)
- Vendor evaluation checklist (how to pick the right tools)
- Risk assessment guide (identify and mitigate common adoption risks)
- Implementation timeline template (realistic 90-day plan)

Best for: Business owners starting their AI journey who want a structured approach.
Format: PDF (37 pages)
URL: https://beornsco.github.io/ai-starter-kit/
Buy: https://beornscout.gumroad.com/l/qizoop

### AI Prompt Library for Business (€19)
200+ copy-paste AI prompts organized by department and use case.

Departments covered:
- Marketing: social media posts, blog outlines, ad copy, SEO meta descriptions, email campaigns
- Sales: cold outreach, follow-up sequences, objection handling, proposal drafts, CRM summaries
- HR: job descriptions, interview questions, onboarding checklists, performance review templates, policy drafts
- Operations: process documentation, meeting summaries, project briefs, SOP creation, vendor communications
- Finance: expense reports, budget summaries, invoice follow-ups, financial analysis prompts, forecast templates
- Customer Service: reply templates, FAQ generation, complaint resolution, feedback analysis, knowledge base articles

Each prompt includes:
- The prompt text (ready to copy-paste)
- When to use it
- Expected output
- Customization tips

Best for: Teams that already use AI tools but want better, faster results.
Format: PDF (127 pages)
URL: https://beornsco.github.io/ai-prompt-library/
Buy: https://beornscout.gumroad.com/l/mxkxl

### AI Automation Playbook for SMEs (€39)
170-page playbook with 12 step-by-step implementation guides for automating real business processes.

The 12 playbooks:
1. Email response automation (triage, draft, and send routine replies)
2. Invoice processing (extract data, match POs, flag exceptions)
3. Report generation (pull data, create summaries, distribute automatically)
4. Meeting scheduling (coordinate calendars, send agendas, capture notes)
5. Customer onboarding (welcome sequences, document collection, setup checklists)
6. Social media management (content creation, scheduling, engagement monitoring)
7. Lead qualification (scoring, routing, initial outreach)
8. Inventory alerts (stock monitoring, reorder triggers, supplier notifications)
9. Employee onboarding (paperwork, training schedules, access provisioning)
10. Data entry and migration (extraction, validation, system updates)
11. Customer feedback analysis (collection, sentiment analysis, action items)
12. Financial reconciliation (transaction matching, discrepancy flagging, reporting)

Each playbook includes:
- Current state assessment (what you're doing now)
- Tool recommendations (free and paid options)
- Step-by-step setup instructions
- Testing and validation checklist
- Troubleshooting guide
- Expected time savings

Best for: Business owners ready to automate specific processes.
Format: PDF (170 pages)
URL: https://beornsco.github.io/ai-automation-playbook/
Buy: https://beornscout.gumroad.com/l/pdrqfp

### Core Bundle (€69, save €16)
All three products together at a discount.
URL: https://beornscout.gumroad.com/l/fabnse

### AI Prompt Pack: Real Estate (€14)
50+ AI prompts built specifically for real estate professionals.

Categories covered:
1. Property Listings & Descriptions (write compelling listings, highlight features, neighborhood descriptions)
2. Client Communication (follow-up emails, showing confirmations, offer updates, negotiation messages)
3. Lead Generation & Ad Copy (social media posts, ad copy, open house invitations, referral requests)
4. Market Analysis & Reports (neighborhood comparisons, price trend summaries, investment analysis)
5. Marketing Content (blog posts, newsletter content, social media captions, video scripts)
6. Transaction Management (closing checklists, document summaries, timeline updates)
7. Client Onboarding (buyer questionnaires, seller prep guides, expectation-setting emails)
8. Social Media & Personal Branding (bio writing, testimonial requests, just-sold posts, market updates)

Each prompt includes:
- The prompt text (ready to copy-paste with [BRACKETS] for customization)
- When to use it
- Expected output
- Pro tip for better results

Best for: Real estate agents, brokers, and property managers.
Format: PDF (38 pages)
URL: https://beornsco.github.io/ai-prompts-real-estate/
Buy: https://beornscout.gumroad.com/l/rqikln

---

## Free Resources

### 5 Days to Your First AI Quick Win (Free Email Course)
A free 5-day email course for SME owners and their teams.

Day-by-day breakdown:
- Day 1: Find your best AI opportunity (audit your daily tasks for automation potential)
- Day 2: Write your first AI prompt (template and examples for business use)
- Day 3: Build a reusable prompt template library (organize prompts by department)
- Day 4: Create a one-page AI policy for your company (governance basics)
- Day 5: Calculate your AI ROI and build your 30-day plan (measure results, plan next steps)

URL: https://beornsco.github.io/ai-course/

### Free Lead Magnets
- AI Opportunity Discovery Checklist (4-page PDF): https://beornsco.github.io/downloads/AI-Opportunity-Discovery-Checklist-FREE.pdf
- 10 Best AI Prompts for Business (6-page PDF): https://beornsco.github.io/downloads/10-Best-AI-Prompts-for-Business-FREE.pdf
- 5-Minute Automation Audit (PDF): https://beornsco.github.io/downloads/5-Minute-Automation-Audit-FREE.pdf

All purchases include a 30-day money-back guarantee via Gumroad.
One-time purchase, no subscription required.

---

## Target Audience

Primary: SME owners and operators (10-200 employees)
Secondary: Business managers, department heads, operations leads
Industries: Professional services, retail, real estate, healthcare, hospitality, e-commerce, manufacturing
Geography: Global (content in English, pricing in EUR)

## What Makes AI Business Toolkit Different

- Written for non-technical business owners (no coding, no jargon)
- Practical and actionable (templates, checklists, step-by-step guides)
- Works with any major AI tool (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini)
- One-time purchase (no monthly subscription)
- Covers the full journey from assessment to implementation
- Department-specific content (not generic "AI is cool" advice)

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Who is AI Business Toolkit for?
A: SME owners and operators with 10-200 employees who want to adopt AI without hiring consultants or learning to code.

Q: What AI tools does this work with?
A: All guides and prompts are designed for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. Most templates work with any major AI assistant.

Q: Do I need technical skills?
A: No. Everything is written in plain language with step-by-step instructions. If you can use email, you can use these guides.

Q: What do I get for free?
A: A 5-day email course, an AI Opportunity Checklist, a 10 Best Prompts sampler, a 5-Minute Automation Audit, and 19 blog articles.

Q: Is there a money-back guarantee?
A: Yes. Gumroad offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on all purchases.

Q: Can I buy individual products or do I need the bundle?
A: Each product is sold separately. The bundle saves you €16 compared to buying all three individually.

Q: How are the guides delivered?
A: Instantly via Gumroad. You get a download link immediately after purchase.

Q: Are updates included?
A: Yes. When we update a product, existing customers get the new version for free.
